title: George W. Stewart
body: George W. Stewart (February 22, 1876 – August 16, 1956) was an American acoustician, physicist, and educator. In 1941, Stewart was president of the American Physical Society. He was named emeritus professor of physics at the University of Iowa and was awarded the Oersted Medal in 1943. His research interests included acoustics and X-ray studies of liquids.
